creator: sanpei@sanpei.org
text:
I'm maintainer of japanese/kanji18 and japanese/kanji26.

I update these ports with below points:
	- use MASTERDIR, instead of .include "${.CURDIR}/........
	  suggested at ports-jp@jp.FreeBSD.org
	- change and normalize my(maintainer) e-mail address
	  to sanpei@sanpei.org

Thank you.
